headline: Dominik Szoboszlai
body: Dominik Szoboszlai set to commit his future to Liverpool by penning a new long-term contract. Huge boost for new head coach Andoni Iraola. Nothing signed yet but outline agreement in place with the Hungary international. Full story... nytimes.com/athletic/7449333… Link Dominik Szoboszlai set to sign long-term Liverpool contract extension The Hungary international has two years remaining on his current deal but is set to end speculation over his future at Anfield. nytimes.com
raw_text:
Dominik Szoboszlai set to commit his future to Liverpool by penning a new long-term contract. Huge boost for new head coach Andoni Iraola.
Nothing signed yet but outline agreement in place with the Hungary international.
